title: Asman Garh Palace
tagline: Asman Garh Palace — heritage city of Telangana

overview.short: Asman Garh Palace located in Malakpet, a suburb of Hyderabad, was a palace belonging to the Paigahs of Hyderabad State.
overview.description: Asman Garh Palace located in Malakpet, a suburb of Hyderabad, was a palace belonging to the Paigahs of Hyderabad State. The palace was declared a heritage structure by INTACH. Asman means "sky", and Garh means "home", since the palace was located so high on a hillock. The palace hosted a museum displaying archaeological relics. After that converted to an orphanage for a brief period of time.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Raymond's Tomb
topPlaces.description: Raymond's tomb is the tomb of Michel Joachim Marie Raymond, a French general in the army of the 2nd Nizam of Hyderabad State, Nizam Ali Khan, Asaf Jah II. The tomb, located today in Hyderabad, India is a black granite tombstone, conical, about 7 metres high and it has the initials JR on it. The pavilion was built by the Nizam and collapsed in October 2001 in heavy rain.

topPlaces.name: Musarambagh metro station
topPlaces.description: The Musarambagh Metro Station is on the Red Line of the Hyderabad Metro, India.

topPlaces.name: Moosarambagh
topPlaces.description: Moosrambagh also Moosa Ram Bagh is an old suburb of Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is named after the French military commander Monsieur Raymond who served the Nizams of the Hyderabad state during the 18th century.

topPlaces.name: Gaddiannaram
topPlaces.description: Gaddiannaram is a suburb in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is located close to the major commercial center, Dilsukhnagar.

topPlaces.name: Dilsukhnagar
topPlaces.description: Dilsukhnagar is a commercial and residential neighborhood in Hyderabad, Telangana. One of the largest areas of the city, it is governed by the Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Dilsukhnagar metro station
topPlaces.description: The Dilsukhnagar Metro Station is located on the Red Line of the Hyderabad Metro in India. It is near to Mega Theatre, Imint Financial Sol (Stock Market training institute), Sai Baba Temple, Konark Theatre, Dilsukh Nagar Bus Depot, Rajdhani Theatre and Pragathi Degree College.

topPlaces.name: Sai Baba Temple, Dilsukhnagar
topPlaces.description: Sai Baba Temple is a Hindu temple of Sai Baba located in Dilsukhnagar, Hyderabad, India. It is one of the most popular temples in Hyderabad.

topPlaces.name: Santoshnagar
topPlaces.description: Santosh Nagar Colony, or Santoshnagar Colony, is a residential and commercial area in Hyderabad, India. It is located near Saidabad in the Old City of Hyderabad and DRDO laboratories.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Asman Garh Palace?
faq.a: The best time to visit Asman Garh Palace is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Asman Garh Palace?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (17 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (3 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Asman Garh Palace?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Asman Garh Palace at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Asman Garh Palace?
faq.a: Stays in Asman Garh Palace start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Asman Garh Palace?
faq.a: The top attractions are Raymond's Tomb, Musarambagh metro station, Moosarambagh, Gaddiannaram, Dilsukhnagar.
